song.title: Wide as the Sky & There is No Other Name
song.lyrics: [V1] There is no other name By which men can be saved There is no other Name under heaven There is rest for my soul And the wounded made whole And the captives set free and forgiven [B1] All the other names fade away All the other names fade away Until there’s only You All the other names fade away Jesus, take Your place Jesus, take Your place [B2] Hands up hearts open wide as the sky We lift You high, we lift You high Hands up hearts open wide as we cry God we lift Your name high
song.author: Matt Redman & Hillsong
